name: golang-github-xdg-go-scram-dev
title: golang-github-xdg-go-scram-dev
description:
RFC-5802 SCRAM in Go (library)
This package provides client and server implementations of the Salted
Challenge Response Authentication Mechanism (SCRAM) described in
RFC-5802 (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5802) and
RFC-7677 (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7677).
.
It includes both client and server side support.
.
Channel binding and extensions are not (yet) supported.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-xdg-go-scram-dev because RFC-5802 SCRAM in Go (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-xdg-go-scram-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-xdg-go-scram-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-xdg-go-scram-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
